name: Nightbane
description: Dual-form R.C.C. — ordinary humans who, after the Becoming, shift between a human Facade and a unique Morphus (the Race of the Thousand Shapes). Facade attributes roll 3D6 and use standard strength; Morphus adds +10 P.S./P.E./Spd, +6 P.P., supernatural strength damage, and innate Martial Arts. All Nightbane share the natural powers on pp. 86–88; Morphus shape and trait bonuses come from Tab 6 (Creating the Nightbane). At O.C.C. selection, choose a skill package (Basic, faction training, Sorcerer, Mystic, or Warlord). Six secondary skills at 1st level (+2 at levels 4 and 8).

classAbilities.name: The Becoming
classAbilities.description: Shift between Facade and Morphus at will (one full melee round; M.E. save 12+ reduces to ~3 seconds). +1 to save at 1st level, +1 per two levels thereafter.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Nightvision 200 ft (Facade) or 500 ft (Morphus). Sense other Nightbane within 300 ft + 30 ft per level; automatic recognition when visible, Perception roll for direction/distance when not.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Attributes & Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Morphus: +10 P.S., P.E., and Spd; +6 P.P.; Supernatural Strength damage table. Regenerate 10 S.D.C./H.P. at the end of each melee round (overwhelmed by sustained automatic weapon fire). Not invulnerable — any weapon can harm or kill a Nightbane.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Pool
classAbilities.description: Facade P.E. + 3D6×10 + 20 at 1st level; +3D6 P.P.E. per level of experience. Engine rolls resolve from the selected skill package (same formula for all Nightbane R.C.C. packages).

classAbilities.name: Horror Factor (Morphus)
classAbilities.description: Base Horror Factor 6 in Morphus regardless of appearance (none in Facade). Morphus traits from Creating the Nightbane may raise Horror Factor to a maximum of 18.

classAbilities.name: Mirror Walk
classAbilities.description: Morphus only — cross to/from the Nightlands through a mirrored counterpart (2 P.P.E., one melee round; carry up to 100 lb, or 1 P.P.E. per 2 lb for passengers/cargo).

classAbilities.name: Immunities
classAbilities.description: Immune to all mind control (including vampiric control), spells, and psionics that impose mind control; immune to vampire slow-kill bite.

classAbilities.name: Morphus Combat
classAbilities.description: Innate Hand to Hand: Martial Arts in Morphus (+1 attack per melee, +1 initiative, +2 strike/parry/dodge, +3 roll/pull punch, +4 save vs magic, +3 save vs psionics/disease/horror factor). Facade uses normal hand to hand only.

classAbilities.name: Talents
classAbilities.description: One free Talent at 1st level; additional free Talents at levels 4, 7, 10, and 12. More may be purchased by permanently spending P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Immune to Transformations
classAbilities.description: Cannot be physically transformed by metamorphosis, petrification, vampire transformation, curses, wishes, or similar magic.

demographics.averageLifespan: Unknown — many live over 1,000 years; some rumored over 5,000

name: Guardian
description: Optional R.C.C. — supernatural beings of light and energy, often former humans transformed with faded memories but a drive to protect humankind. Not omnipotent; conventional, magic, psionic, and supernatural attacks can kill them. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_guardian_rcc` (auto-mounted): 10 related + 8 secondary skills from a restricted, mostly non-technological list (Communications: basic radio only; Domestic +10%; Medical: First Aid/Holistic/Paramedic +10%; Pilot: auto/motorcycle/horsemanship +5%; Technical +5%; Wilderness +5%; no Electrical/Espionage/Mechanical/Military/Rogue/Science); +1 related skill at levels 3, 6, 9, and 12; typically Hand to Hand: Basic; start in street clothes with 2D4×10 cash (may rise to 2D6×100 through allies). P.P.E. P.E.×5 + 20/level (on shadow O.C.C.).

classAbilities.name: Precognitive Senses
classAbilities.description: Instinctive gut feelings lead Guardians toward places their help may be needed — rarely clear or definite (flashes of locations/events). G.M. should not overuse; best at adventure openings or brief flashes that something is wrong.

classAbilities.name: Supernatural Senses
classAbilities.description: Perfect nightvision 500 ft (152 m); see all light spectrums including infrared and ultraviolet; see perfectly in blinding light. See the invisible and recognize illusions on a Perception roll of 10+. +1 initiative and +3 on all Perception rolls (included in racial bonuses where modeled).

classAbilities.name: Super-Regeneration & Healing Touch
classAbilities.description: Heal 2D6 damage every hour without P.P.E. Healing Touch: spend 1 P.P.E. per point healed (max one touch equal to P.E. attribute); usable once per minute (4 melees), costs two melee actions; aura of light surrounds Guardian and patient.

classAbilities.name: Powers of Light
classAbilities.description: Energy blasts: 1D6 S.D.C. per P.P.E., +3 to strike. Light shields: 5 S.D.C. protection per P.P.E., duration 1 minute (4 melees) per level. Body illumination as bright sunlight at no P.P.E. (half effectiveness vs. sun-hating entities).

classAbilities.name: Nullify Magic
classAbilities.description: Counteract spells by spending P.P.E. exceeding the spell's cost (flash of light; one melee action per attempt). Sense spellcasting or ongoing spell effects in presence. Must decide P.P.E. spent before knowing the spell's cost.

classAbilities.name: Hover & Flight
classAbilities.description: Hover/levitate: 2 P.P.E., lasts 2 minutes per level. Fly: 6 P.P.E., lasts 2 minutes per level, max 40 mph (64 km) and 2,000 ft (610 m) altitude.

classAbilities.name: Solar Sustenance
classAbilities.description: No food, water, or air required — solar powered via light energy. A few hours of sunlight daily maintains health (overcast days count).

classAbilities.name: Light Deprivation
classAbilities.description: After 2+ days without light (including Nightlands): lose 20 S.D.C./day (then H.P. down to 10). After 7 days: attributes, powers, attacks, and bonuses halved; after 14 days reduced to one (can linger decades). Recovery: 1 day sunlight per decade deprived; under one year deprivation restores full strength in 6 hours of sunlight.

classAbilities.name: Horror Factor
classAbilities.description: Horror Factor 9 when alien features show; 12 when displaying energy powers — often manifests as awe or adoration instead of terror.

classAbilities.name: Guardian Psionics
classAbilities.description: Master psionic. Start with Empathy, Mind Block, Presence Sense, and See Aura. +1 Sensitive or Healing power each level after first; +10 I.S.P. per level.

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: Cannot learn or cast magic; nullify magic and innate light powers only.

name: Human
description: Default playable species — no dedicated R.C.C. in Nightbane; assumed by human O.C.C.s in Creating a Character (pp. 34–37). Attributes 3D6 each; H.P. P.E. + 1D6 at 1st level; S.D.C. 3D6 (civilian) or 1D4×10 when the selected O.C.C. carries military, police, detective, athletic, or tactical tags. Psionics: no latent Psychic Gate — humans gain psychic powers only through Psychic P.C.C. or other O.C.C.s with an I.S.P. engine (e.g. Sorcerer, Mystic).

name: Wampyr
description: Optional R.C.C. — humans turned by the vampire slow-kill who retain free will and a soul. They need blood to survive, suffer in sunlight, and lack true-vampire shape-changing, but can be slain by conventional weapons and ignore many anti-vampire taboos (running water, holy symbols, native soil). Many hunt their undead cousins; vampire intelligences destroy them on sight. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_wampyr_rcc` (auto-mounted): 10 related skills + 8 secondary skills reflecting pre-transformation life; Hand to Hand purchased from related skills (Basic 1 slot, Expert 2, Martial Arts/Assassin 3); +1 related skill at levels 4, 7, 10, and 12; starting funds 2D4×100 cash and 2D6×1000 in property.

classAbilities.name: Super-Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heal 2D6 S.D.C./Hit Points every melee round. Supernatural strength and endurance. Can be killed by conventional attacks when reduced below zero — not invulnerable like true vampires.

classAbilities.name: Half Damage from Metal Weapons
classAbilities.description: Metal weapons inflict half damage. No other normal vampire invulnerabilities (bullets and knives inflict full damage).

classAbilities.name: Vampire Psionics
classAbilities.description: Starts with all vampire psionic powers except Super Hypnotic Suggestion. Select one additional power from any psychic category at every level after the first (+8 I.S.P. per level).

classAbilities.name: Combat Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +1 on initiative, +3 on all Perception rolls, +5 to save vs horror factor, +5 to save vs mind control and possession; immune to vampire mind control.

classAbilities.name: Vampire Lore
classAbilities.description: Instinctively knows all strengths and weaknesses of true vampires, including those that do not affect Wampyrs — effective vampire hunters.

classAbilities.name: Blood Dependency
classAbilities.description: Must drink one pint of blood every three days (72 hours). Starvation frenzy effects begin after the first week without blood; three days in frenzy state to reach full feeding frenzy.

classAbilities.name: Vulnerability to Sunlight
classAbilities.description: Direct sunlight: 2D6 damage per minute (4 melees). Shade allows regeneration to heal sun damage (dash in/out of shade to operate by day, painfully). While exposed: -1 attack per melee, -1 all combat rolls, -2 initiative and Perception, -20% all skills. Daytime penalties also apply in shade or underground.

classAbilities.name: Anti-Vampire Immunities
classAbilities.description: Running water, holy symbols, herbs, and native-soil sleep requirements do not affect Wampyrs. Staking inflicts heavy damage but does not incapacitate.

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: Cannot work magic; any magic known before transformation is lost forever.

classAbilities.name: Missing Vampire Powers
classAbilities.description: No mist form, bat/wolf shape-shifting, or other true-vampire transformation abilities.

name: Doppleganger
description: Optional R.C.C. — supernatural doubles of Earth humans living in the Nightlands; pale mirror images who know most of what their counterpart knows. Player characters are awakened (aware of their nature). Shadow O.C.C. `occ_doppleganger_rcc` (auto-mounted): skills same as normal humans — select related and secondary skills reflecting the Earth double's O.C.C./life. Attributes 3D6 each (human baseline); S.D.C. uses human rules +20; combat and Hand to Hand same as humans but hand-to-hand damage uses the Supernatural Strength table. P.P.E. 1D4 (magician doubles: two-thirds of counterpart's P.P.E.). I.S.P. M.E. + 2D6 (psychic doubles: all counterpart powers at two-thirds I.S.P.).

demographics.averageLifespan: Average 200 years after appearing in the Nightlands (age slowly; most are killed long before)

classAbilities.name: Earth Double Link
classAbilities.description: On Earth without the double present in the Nightlands, a Doppleganger dies within 48 hours unless the human double is killed or one of them returns to the Nightlands. To live on Earth permanently, the double must die (often murdered by the Doppleganger). If both are on opposite worlds simultaneously, both can survive. Good-aligned Dopplegangers swept to Earth may resist murderous urges but still perish after 48 hours unless they return.

classAbilities.name: P.P.E. Absorption
classAbilities.description: No food or water required — survive by absorbing ambient P.P.E. May still taste and enjoy food.

classAbilities.name: Regeneration
classAbilities.description: Heal 1 H.P./S.D.C. plus P.E. attribute bonus per hour.

classAbilities.name: Vampire Immunities
classAbilities.description: Immune to the vampire slow-kill bite and cannot be turned into vampires; can still be slain by vampires.

classAbilities.name: Magic Artifact Vulnerability
classAbilities.description: Magic artifacts and magic weapons inflict double damage. Magic spells do not gain this multiplier.

classAbilities.name: Awakened Psionics
classAbilities.description: Before awakening, no psionic powers. Awakened Dopplegangers: 40% gain minor psionics — select two powers from one category (Physical, Healing, or Sensitive). Dopplegangers of psychic humans gain all counterpart powers at two-thirds I.S.P.

classAbilities.name: Magician Doubles
classAbilities.description: Only Dopplegangers of human magicians can use magic; all others are mundane. Magician doubles have two-thirds of their counterpart's P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: No Nightbane Double
classAbilities.description: Nightbane never have Dopplegangers — a separate species from Earth's mirror population.

name: Secondary Vampire
description: Optional R.C.C. — second-generation undead created by a master vampire's slow kill. Retains more human memories than master or wild vampires; full vampire power suite but susceptible to master mind control. P.C.s often Unprincipled, Anarchist, or Aberrant rebels fighting blood hunger. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_secondary_vampire_rcc` (auto-mounted). Hit Point equivalent 3D4×10. P.P.E. 1D4×10 (frozen). Typical NPC experience 1D6+1 (2nd–7th); P.C.s start at 1st level. Horror Factor 12. Radiates supernatural evil.

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Created by master vampire slow kill; subordinate to master and vampire intelligence mind control, but may retain vestiges of humanity as P.C.s.

demographics.averageLifespan: Immortal — frozen at age of transformation

classAbilities.name: Hit Point Equivalent
classAbilities.description: 3D4×10 Hit Point equivalent (not normal S.D.C./H.P.).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Five hand-to-hand attacks per melee, or combine up to two psionic attacks with physical attacks (each psionic attack ≈ two hand-to-hand actions; secondary: two psionic + one hand-to-hand possible). Supernatural strength; killing bite 2D6 + P.S. bonus.

classAbilities.name: Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 initiative, +3 Perception (apply at table), impervious to psionic/magic sleep and paralysis — in addition to save modifiers on the race row.

classAbilities.name: Psionic Powers
classAbilities.description: Major psionic (save vs psionics 12+). I.S.P. 2D6×10. Granted catalog powers on shadow O.C.C. at 4th-level potency.

classAbilities.name: Pre-Rebirth Magic
classAbilities.description: If the vampire knew magic before undeath, retain about half of spells at frozen power levels; cannot learn new magic or increase P.P.E.

classAbilities.name: Player Character Note
classAbilities.description: Unprincipled (selfish good) is the highest good alignment possible for P.C.s fighting blood hunger; Anarchist and Aberrant evil are more common.

name: Wild Vampire
description: Optional R.C.C. — third-generation (or starved/insane) undead; savage predators created by secondary slow kills (58% of failures) or degeneration from starvation. Animalistic, easily provoked, subservient to vampire intelligence and most creators. Shadow O.C.C. `occ_wild_vampire_rcc` (auto-mounted). Hit Point equivalent 2D4×10. P.P.E. 6D6. Typical experience 1D4 (1st–4th). Horror Factor 12. Radiates supernatural evil.

metadata.pairedRaceRelationship: Third-generation or degenerate undead — usually created by secondary vampire slow kill; subservient to master, secondary creators, and vampire intelligence. Hunted by Nightlord minions.

demographics.averageLifespan: Immortal — frozen at age of transformation

classAbilities.name: Hit Point Equivalent
classAbilities.description: 2D4×10 Hit Point equivalent (not normal S.D.C./H.P.).

classAbilities.name: Combat
classAbilities.description: Five hand-to-hand attacks per melee, or combine up to two psionic attacks with physical attacks. Supernatural strength; killing bite 2D6 + P.S. bonus.

classAbilities.name: Bonuses
classAbilities.description: +2 initiative, impervious to psionic/magic sleep and paralysis — in addition to save modifiers on the race row.

classAbilities.name: Psionic Powers
classAbilities.description: Minor psionic (save vs psionics 12+). I.S.P. 1D6×10. Granted catalog powers on shadow O.C.C. at 4th-level potency.

classAbilities.name: No Magic
classAbilities.description: All pre-transformation spell knowledge is forgotten during transformation.

classAbilities.name: Player Character Note
classAbilities.description: Anarchist is the best alignment possible; all wild P.C.s remain crazed, easily provoked, and blood-hungry despite alignment.
